title: Piel en Armonia | Precision dermatology in Quito
description: Precision dermatology with premium editorial language: clinical evaluation, treatment routes, telemedicine, and legal clarity.

slides.title: When skin changes, the first reading must be precise.
slides.description: Comprehensive review of skin, hair, and nails before deciding any intervention.

slides.title: Protocol, evidence, follow-up: never empty promises.
slides.description: Peels, laser, and biostimulation under medical hierarchy and defined checkpoints.

slides.title: Remote when it adds clarity. In-person when the case demands it.
slides.description: Digital triage with safe escalation to clinic when lesion behavior requires direct review.

slides.title: Clinical continuity reduces noise and accelerates decisions.
slides.description: Every follow-up keeps visual records and route adjustments based on real response.

slides.title: Contemporary dermatology for Quito: human judgment and precise execution.
slides.description: Specialized team in clinical skin care, pediatric dermatology, and medical aesthetics.

newsStrip.label: Clinical Update
newsStrip.headline: Schedule is in V6 recalibration: clinical routes, legal pages, and telemedicine remain available.

editorial.title: Routes that combine medical judgment, technology, and human guidance.
editorial.deck: Structure inspired by high-end corporate portals: broad blocks, deliberate pacing, progressive reading.

cards.title: From first finding to full treatment strategy
cards.copy: Comprehensive consultation for new lesions, recurrent flares, and texture changes.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea: sustained control, not instant fixes
cards.copy: Progressive adjustments, visual follow-up, and stage-based clinical objectives.

cards.title: Dermatology laser with traceable parameters
cards.copy: Indication by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance with post-session follow-up.

cards.title: Remote consultation to filter urgency and define next steps
cards.copy: A useful route when you need initial guidance before attending in person.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology with clear family communication
cards.copy: Therapeutic plans explained in plain, responsible language for caregivers.

cards.title: Clinical decision matrix for each patient profile
cards.copy: Routes are documented, explained, and corrected through evidence.

corporateMatrix.title: Dermatology Programs and Units
corporateMatrix.deck: Corporate-portal reading rhythm: large visual card, clear category, and direct next step.

cards.title: Comprehensive Diagnosis Unit
cards.copy: Cross-route reading of skin, hair, and nails with a structured follow-up map.

cards.title: Acne and Rosacea Program
cards.copy: Flare control, therapeutic adjustment, and staged visual follow-up.

cards.title: Dermatology Laser Platform

cards.title: Risk Lesion Screening Unit
cards.copy: Early warning-sign review with a defined escalation route.

cards.title: Remote Triage and Continuity
cards.copy: Initial orientation when you need to decide whether in-clinic escalation is required.

cards.copy: Mesotherapy, biostimulation, and combined protocols under medical criteria.
